headline: How Is MGM Resorts International's Stock Performance Compared to Other Gaming Stocks?
summary: As MGM Resorts International has outperformed its industry peers recently, analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Longleaf Partners Global Fund’s Updates on MGM Resorts (MGM)
summary: Longleaf Partners, managed by Southeastern Asset Management, released its fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter for “Longleaf Partners Global Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund returned 5.27% in the quarter, compared to the MSCI World’s 3.12 % and the MSCI World Value’s 3.34% return. The Fund returned 16.72% for the year, compared […]
